items.title: Israeli soldiers shot a Palestinian boy and stood around as he bled to death, video shows
items.dek: Israeli forces blocked Palestinian ambulances while a 14-year-old lay bleeding for at least 45 minutes.
items.body: Israeli forces blocked Palestinian ambulances while a 14-year-old lay bleeding for at least 45 minutes.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Australian PM apologises after calling child sex abuse survivor and advocate 'difficult'
items.dek: Former Australian of the Year Grace Tame said the word was a "misogynist's code for a woman who won't comply".
items.body: Former Australian of the Year Grace Tame said the word was a "misogynist's code for a woman who won't comply".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Orbán accuses Ukraine of disrupting oil supplies to Hungary
items.dek: Ukraine says a critical pipeline was closed after Russian strikes.
items.body: Ukraine says a critical pipeline was closed after Russian strikes.
items.author: IriLine Desk
